info.name: CipherLearn App API v1.0.11
info.description:
Complete API collection for CipherLearn Mobile App (Student + Teacher single app).

**Auth Flow:**
1. Admin creates student/teacher accounts from dashboard → registration email sent
2. User opens app → enters registered email
3. First time: set password (POST /app/auth/setup-password)
4. Login (POST /app/auth/login) → JWT returned with role
5. Role-based dashboard: STUDENT or TEACHER

**Endpoints by role:**

Student-only:
- Profile, Fees, Notifications (preferences)
- Attendance: self-view (summary, history, calendar, QR mark)
- Assignments: browse, submit, view submission
- Tests: upcoming, results, performance analytics
- Resources: videos, notes, study materials

Teacher (requires TEACHER role JWT):
- Attendance: get batch students, bulk mark, reports, date detail
- Assignments: create/update/delete, review per-student status
- Tests: manage grading (score sheet, bulk save scores, publish results, summary)
- Resources: upload/manage study materials (PDF, video, etc.)

Shared (both roles):
- Auth, Dashboard, Lectures/Timetable, Announcements
- Notifications: device token registration

**Lecture creation is admin-only (via dashboard).** Teachers and students can only VIEW lectures, add notes, and mark complete.

**Security Headers on all requests:**
- Authorization: Bearer {{appToken}}
- Content-Type: application/json (or multipart/form-data for uploads)

**Rate Limits:**
- Auth: 5 req/15min (login), 3 req/hr (password reset)
- File uploads: 10 uploads/5min per IP
- General reads: 120 req/min per IP
- Token refresh: 10 req/min per IP

**File Upload Limits:**
- Assignment submission: 25 MB/file, 5 files (PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, images, ZIP)
- Assignment attachments (teacher): 50 MB/file, 5 files
- Study materials (teacher): 100 MB/file, 5 files (includes video: MP4, MOV, AVI)
- All uploads: memory storage → Cloudinary, magic number validated

**Caching:**
- Announcement list: 3 min | detail: 5 min
- Notification preferences: 10 min per student
- Fee structures: 60 min per batch
- Attendance: 2 min

**Setup:**
1. Import into Postman
2. Create environment: baseUrl = http://localhost:5000/api
3. Run 'App Login' → appToken auto-saved
4. Use STUDENT email for student routes, TEACHER email for teacher routes

**Base URL:** http://localhost:5000/api

item.name: App Onboarding
item.description:
First-launch onboarding flow for the React Native app.

**QR Scan Flow:**
1. Admin generates QR from admin portal (Infrastructure tab → 'App Onboarding QR')
2. QR encodes JSON: { v, api, name, slug, primary, accent, logo? }
3. App scans QR → stores `api` base URL in AsyncStorage
4. App calls GET /app/settings to fetch full class config (branding, features)
5. App shows branded login screen

No authentication required — these are public endpoints.

request.description:
Public endpoint. Returns class branding, feature flags, and basic class info.

Call this immediately after scanning the onboarding QR code to get the full configuration.

**QR payload structure** (encoded in the QR image):
```json
{
  "v": 1,
  "api": "https://your-class.onrender.com/api",
  "name": "Sarthak Classes",
  "slug": "sarthak-classes",
  "primary": "#0F766E",
  "accent": "#F59E0B",
  "logo": "https://res.cloudinary.com/..." (optional)
}
```

**React Native usage:**
```ts
// After QR scan:
await AsyncStorage.setItem('apiBase', qrPayload.api);
const { data } = await axios.get(`${qrPayload.api}/app/settings`);
// Apply branding from data.branding and data.features
```

**No auth required.**

response.name: 200 OK — Class config

item.name: App Auth
item.description:
Student/Teacher mobile app authentication.

Rate limits:
- Login: 5 attempts per 15 min per IP
- Password reset: 3 requests per hour per IP
- Enrollment check: 10 per minute per IP
- Token refresh: 10 per minute per IP

request.description:
Check if a student is enrolled before allowing password setup.

Rate limit: 10 req/min per IP
First-time password setup for enrolled students.

Student/Teacher login. Token auto-saved to appToken env variable.

Rate limit: 5 attempts per 15 min per IP
Security: Account locked after 5 failed attempts

Refresh JWT token before expiry.

Rate limit: 10 req/min per IP

Request password reset OTP via email.

Rate limit: 3 req/hr per IP
Verify the OTP sent to email for password reset.
Reset password using verified OTP.
Get current authenticated user profile.
Logout and blacklist the current token. Token is invalidated immediately.

Change password for the authenticated user (student or teacher).

Required: currentPassword (must match stored hash), newPassword (min 6 chars)

Errors: 401 if currentPassword is wrong, 400 if newPassword is too short

**New in v1.0.11**

Get full student profile with batch details.

Cache: 5 min
Student: update phone, address, parentName. All fields optional.
Teacher: get own profile with extended fields.
Teacher: update profile fields like qualification, work timings, subjects, and bio.
Student: get their class teacher info for the Ask Doubts screen. Returns teacher profile with qualification, subjects, etc.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: App dashboard data (student-only in current backend implementation)

request.description: Student-only dashboard overview.
Teacher-only dashboard overview (profile, today's lectures, announcements, quick access counts).
Get today's lecture schedule for the dashboard.
Get quick access items for dashboard.
Today's schedule. Returns: date, totalClasses, lectures (title, teacher, startTime, endTime, room, status: FINISHED/ONGOING/UPCOMING), nextClass with countdown.
Schedule for a specific date.
Single lecture detail: description, notes, status.
Teacher adds post-lecture notes.
Teacher marks a lecture as completed.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Mathematics - Chapter 5",
    "subject": "Mathematics",
    "batchId": 1,
    "date": "2026-03-25",
    "startTime": "10:00",
    "endTime": "11:30",
    "room": "Room 101",
    "description": "Quadratic equations and graphs",
    "isOnline": false,
    "meetingLink": null,
    "notifyStudents": true
}

request.description:
Teacher: schedule a new lecture for a batch.

Required: title, subject, batchId, date (YYYY-MM-DD), startTime (HH:MM), endTime (HH:MM)
Optional: room, description, isOnline, meetingLink, notifyStudents (sends push notification to batch students)

**New in v1.0.10**

Teacher: update a lecture they own. All fields are optional.

**New in v1.0.10**

Teacher: soft-delete a lecture they own. Sets isDeleted=true, status=CANCELLED.

**New in v1.0.10**
All tests for the student. Returns: title, subject, testType, date, time, syllabus, daysUntil.
Filter: upcoming tests only (SCHEDULED/ONGOING).
Filter: completed tests (COMPLETED/PUBLISHED).
Filter: published results with 'VIEW SCORE' button.
Test details: type, subject, date, time, duration, totalMarks, hall, syllabus, instructions, daysUntil. If PUBLISHED: includes myScore (marksObtained, percentage, grade, status, remarks, checkedBy).
Student performance analytics: overallAverage, totalTests, passed, failed, highestScore, lowestScore, subjectWise averages, trend over time.
Teacher view: all tests for a specific batch.
Teacher view: all student scores for a test, sorted by marks descending.

query.description: grading_pending | graded | draft. Optional — omit for all.

request.description:
Teacher: list their own tests with grading status tabs.

Tabs:
- grading_pending: test is COMPLETED/PUBLISHED but not all students have scores yet
- graded: all students have scores entered
- draft: test in SCHEDULED/ONGOING status (not yet graded)

Response: { tests: [{ id, title, subject, testType, batchId, batchName, date, totalMarks, status, gradingStatus: GRADING_PENDING|GRADED|DRAFT, scoredCount, totalStudents }], pagination }

Auth: TEACHER role required.

Teacher: score entry sheet for a test — all students in the batch.

Response: [{ studentId, name, rollNo, marksObtained (null if not entered), percentage, grade, isPassed, remarks, status: PENDING|PUBLISHED }]

marksObtained=null means not yet graded. Use this to populate the score entry form.

Auth: TEACHER role + must own the test.

Teacher: bulk save/update student scores for a test.

Auto-computes per student: percentage = (marksObtained / totalMarks) × 100, grade (A/B/C/D/F), isPassed (marks ≥ passingMarks).

Upsert — safe to call multiple times (e.g., save progress in stages).

Blocked if results are already published (scoresLocked=true).

Auth: TEACHER role + must own the test.

Teacher: publish test results — students can now see their scores.

Sets test.status=PUBLISHED, scoresLocked=true, publishedAt=now.
All saved scores become visible to students in their Test Detail screen.

Once published, scores cannot be edited (scoresLocked=true).

Auth: TEACHER role + must own the test.

Teacher: class performance summary for a test.

Response: { testId, title, totalStudents, scored, averageScore, highestScore, lowestScore, passRate, distribution: { A, B, C, D, F } }

Used for the analytics card in the Teacher Test Detail screen.

Auth: TEACHER role + must own the test.

Teacher: download all student scores for a test as a CSV file.

Response: text/csv file download.
Columns: Student Name, Marks Obtained, Total Marks, Percentage, Grade, Status (PASS/FAIL/PENDING)

Filename: test-{id}-scores.csv

Triggers a file download in Postman (Save Response → Save to a file).

Auth: TEACHER role + must own the test.

item.name: Attendance
item.description:
Attendance records for students (self-view) and teachers (batch management).

**Student:** performance summary, history, calendar, QR mark
**Teacher:** list batches, get batch students, bulk mark (with subject), date reports, date detail

request.description:
Student attendance performance: totalClasses, present, absent, late, attendancePercentage, statusLabel, monthlyBreakdown, recentAttendance.

Cache: 2 min
Filtered attendance history. All params optional.

Per-day attendance for a month. Returns array of {date, status, subject}.

Cache: 2 min

Student scans QR code to mark attendance.

qrData: opaque token embedded in the QR image (generated by teacher dashboard).
Returns: { success, message } — success=false with reason if QR expired, already marked, or wrong batch.

Teacher: list all active batches (for Select Class/Batch dropdowns in the Mark Attendance screen).

Response: [{ id, name, studentCount }]

Example response:
[
  { "id": 1, "name": "Grade 10 - Batch A", "studentCount": 35 },
  { "id": 2, "name": "Grade 11 - Batch B", "studentCount": 28 }
]

Auth: TEACHER role required.

query.description: Required. Batch to load students for.

request.description:
Teacher: load all active students in a batch for the attendance marking screen.

Response: [{ id, fullname, email }]

Auth: Bearer token with TEACHER role required.

Teacher: bulk mark attendance for a date.

Body fields:
- batchId: number (required)
- date: YYYY-MM-DD (required)
- subject: string (optional) — subject taught in this session, shown in student's attendance history
- records[]: array of { studentId, status: PRESENT|ABSENT|LATE, reason? }

Uses upsert — safe to re-submit to correct a record.
Returns: { marked: number }

Auth: TEACHER role required.

Teacher: paginated attendance reports — one entry per date.

Response: { reports: [{ date, present, absent, late, total, markedBy, markedAt }], pagination }

Each row is an expandable card in the UI. Click date to fetch detail.

Auth: TEACHER role required.

Teacher: per-student attendance for a specific date.

Returns array of { studentId, name, status: PRESENT|ABSENT|LATE, reason, markedAt }

Used by expandable card in the Reports screen.

Auth: TEACHER role required.

item.name: Assignments
item.description:
Assignment slots, submissions with Cloudinary file upload, and teacher reviews.

**Changes in v1.0.2:**
- Submit: 25MB per file (was 10MB), Cloudinary storage (no local disk)
- Submit: optional `note` field (text note from student)
- List: `?status=pending|completed` for Pending/Completed tabs
- Submission response now includes `note`, `publicId` in files

request.description: Student assignment statistics: total, pending, accepted, rejected counts.

All assignments for the student's batch with submission status.

Response includes: id, title, subject, dueDate, isOverdue, daysRemaining, hasSubmitted, submissionStatus, submission (if exists, includes note field).

query.description: Only assignments not yet submitted (Pending tab)

request.description:
Student Pending tab: assignments not yet submitted.

Status badges: Overdue (red), Pending (yellow)
Deadline display: 'Overdue' | 'Due Tomorrow, 11:59 PM' | 'Due Mar 05 (7 days)'

Student Completed tab: submitted assignments.

Status badge: Completed (green)
Shows submission timestamp
Teacher/Admin view: all assignments with submission stats (total, pending, accepted, rejected).

Assignment detail: subject badge, title, dueDate, teacher (createdBy), instructions, attached files (Cloudinary URLs + video links).

For students: includes their submission with files, note, status, feedback.

formdata.description: Upload 1-5 files. Max 25MB each. PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, images, ZIP accepted.

formdata.value: Please find my completed worksheet attached. I used the quadratic formula method.

request.description:
Student submits assignment.

**Upload specs (v1.0.2):**
- Storage: Cloudinary (submissions/ folder)
- Max per file: 25 MB
- Max files: 5
- Types: PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, images (JPEG/PNG/GIF/WebP), ZIP, TXT
- Security: MIME type validation + magic number (file signature) check

**Rate limit:** 10 uploads per 5 min per IP

Re-submission allowed if previous status is REJECTED.

Student's own submission for an assignment slot.

Response includes: files (url, publicId, originalFilename, size, mimeType), note, status, feedback, submittedAt, reviewedAt, reviewedBy.
Teacher/Admin: all submissions for an assignment slot with student details.
Teacher/Admin: single submission with files, note, student info.

Teacher reviews and grades a student submission.

status: ACCEPTED | REJECTED
feedback: optional (required if REJECTED is good practice)

Teacher: quick-stat counters for the Assignments home screen header.

Response: { dueToday: number, toReview: number }

- dueToday: count of PUBLISHED assignments whose dueDate falls today
- toReview: count of PENDING (unreviewed) student submissions across the teacher's assignments

Used for the '3 Due Today' and '12 To Review' cards at the top of the Assignments screen.

Auth: TEACHER role required.

query.description: active | drafts | graded. Optional — omit for all.

request.description:
Teacher: list their own assignments with tab filters.

Tabs:
- active: PUBLISHED + future dueDate (or no dueDate)
- drafts: DRAFT status
- graded: assignments with at least one ACCEPTED/REJECTED submission

Response: { assignments: [{ id, title, subject, batchId, batchName, dueDate, submissionType, assignmentStatus, totalStudents, submitted, pending, accepted }], pagination }

Auth: TEACHER role required.

formdata.value: Solve all 20 problems. Show working steps.

formdata.description: JSON array of batch IDs. All get the same assignment (linked by groupId).
Optional brief attachment. Max 5 files, 50 MB each.

request.description:
Teacher: create assignment for one or more batches.

batchIds: JSON array — one AssignmentSlot is created per batch, all linked by a shared groupId UUID.

File attachments (optional): PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, images, ZIP. Max 50 MB per file, 5 files.
Storage: Cloudinary (study-materials/ folder).
Security: magic number validation.

Rate limit: 10 uploads per 5 min.

Auth: TEACHER role required.

query.description: submitted | not_submitted | late. Optional — omit for all.

request.description:
Teacher: per-student status page for an assignment.

Response: { assignment: { title, subject, dueDate, batchName, totalStudents }, students: [{ studentId, name, status: SUBMITTED|LATE|MISSING, submittedAt?, submissionId? }] }

status filter:
- submitted: has a PENDING/ACCEPTED/REJECTED submission submitted on time
- late: submitted after dueDate
- not_submitted: no submission (MISSING)

Auth: TEACHER role (must own the assignment).

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Chapter 5 — Algebra Worksheet (Revised)",
    "description": "Updated instructions. Focus on problems 10-20.",
    "dueDate": "2026-03-05T23:59:00.000Z",
    "assignmentStatus": "PUBLISHED",
    "allowLateSubmissions": true
}

request.description:
Teacher: update assignment details.

All fields optional. Only provided fields are updated.
Allowed: title, subject, description, dueDate, submissionType, assignmentStatus, allowLateSubmissions, plagiarismCheck.

Auth: TEACHER role + must own the assignment.

Teacher: soft-delete an assignment.

Sets isDeleted=true + records deletedBy. Hidden from students immediately.

Auth: TEACHER role + must own the assignment.

item.name: Announcements
item.description:
School announcements with category filtering, search, and rich detail view.

**Changes in v1.0.2 (complete rewrite):**
- New: category filter (EXAM, HOLIDAY, LECTURE, GENERAL, EVENT)
- New: search by title/description
- New: pagination
- New: detail endpoint with full body, Important Dates metadata, downloadable attachments, department
- Cache: list 3 min, detail 5 min
- Rate limit: 120 req/min

request.description:
Paginated list of active announcements, sorted by priority then date.

Response: { announcements: [...], pagination: { page, limit, total, totalPages } }

Each item: id, title, description (preview), category, priority, department, date, hasAttachments, createdAt

Cache: 3 min (category/search/page scoped)
Filter to EXAM category (Exams tab in UI).
Filter to HOLIDAY category.
Filter to GENERAL category.

query.description: Search in title and description (max 100 chars)

request.description:
Full-text search across title and description. Case-insensitive.

Can combine with category: ?category=EXAM&search=winter

Full announcement detail:
- title, description (preview), body (full rich text)
- category, priority, department (e.g., 'Admin Office')
- date, imageUrl
- hasAttachments
- attachments: [{ url, filename, size, mimeType }] — downloadable files
- metadata: { 'Start Date': 'June 1st, 2026', 'End Date': 'July 14th, 2026', 'Institute Reopens': 'July 15th, 2026' } — Important Dates section

Cache: 5 min per id

item.name: Notifications
item.description:
Student notification preferences (student-only).

**New in v1.0.2**

Categories:
- Academic Alerts: classStartingSoon, timetableChanges
- Exams & Results: newTestScheduled, resultPublished
- Materials & Updates: newStudyMaterial, classResourceUploaded
- Administrative: schoolAnnouncements, doubtResponses
- Quiet Hours: enabled, from (HH:MM), to (HH:MM)

Returns defaults if no preferences saved yet (no 404).
Cache: 10 min per student.
Rate limit: 120 req/min.

request.description:
Save all notification preferences (full update).

Returns complete updated preferences object.
Upsert — safe to call even if no preferences exist yet.

Partial update — only send the categories/fields you want to change. Other preferences remain unchanged.

Use case: user toggles a single switch in the UI.

Enable quiet hours with time range.

from/to: HH:MM format (24-hour). Validated on server.
When enabled: notifications are muted between 'from' and 'to' times.

Register a device push token (student or teacher).

Call after login once push permission is granted. Upsert — safe to call multiple times.

Body: token (ExponentPushToken[...]), platform (EXPO|IOS|ANDROID).

**New in v1.0.6**

Remove a device push token. Call on logout so the user stops receiving notifications on this device.

**New in v1.0.6**

query.description: Set true to return only unread notifications

request.description:
Mark a specific notification as read.

**New in v1.0.10**

Mark all unread notifications as read for the authenticated user.

**New in v1.0.10**

item.name: Resources
item.description:
Study resources: videos, notes, study materials (student view) + material management (teacher).

**Student:** videos, notes, study materials for their batch
**Teacher:** upload and manage study materials (PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, images, video — up to 100 MB/file)

query.description: published | drafts | scheduled. Optional — omit for all.

request.description:
Teacher: list their own study materials with tab filter.

Tabs:
- published: materialStatus=PUBLISHED
- drafts: materialStatus=DRAFT
- scheduled: materialStatus=SCHEDULED (scheduledAt in future)

Response: { materials: [{ id, title, subject, chapter, materialType, materialStatus, scheduledAt, batchId, batchName, visibleBatchIds, files: [{ url, filename, size }], createdAt }], pagination }

Auth: TEACHER role required.

formdata.value: Complete theory notes with solved examples.

formdata.description: NOTES | ASSIGNMENT | REFERENCE | WORKSHEET | OTHER. Optional.
JSON array of batch IDs that can view this material.
Required. 1-5 files. Max 100 MB each. PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, images (JPEG/PNG/WebP), video (MP4/MOV/AVI), ZIP, TXT.

request.description:
Teacher: upload study material files.

File specs:
- Storage: Cloudinary (study-materials/ folder)
- Max per file: 100 MB
- Max files: 5
- Types: PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, images, video (MP4/MOV/AVI), ZIP, TXT
- Security: MIME type guard + magic number validation

Rate limit: 10 uploads per 5 min.

Auth: TEACHER role required.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Chapter 6 — Quadratic Equations (Updated)",
    "description": "Added solved examples for sections 6.3 and 6.4.",
    "subject": "Mathematics",
    "chapter": "Chapter 6",
    "materialType": "NOTES",
    "materialStatus": "PUBLISHED",
    "visibleBatchIds": [1, 2]
}

request.description:
Teacher: update study material metadata.

All fields optional. Files cannot be updated here — delete and re-upload.

Auth: TEACHER role + must own the material.

Teacher: publish a DRAFT or SCHEDULED material immediately.

Sets materialStatus=PUBLISHED. Students can now access it.

Auth: TEACHER role + must own the material.

Teacher: soft-delete a study material.

Sets isDeleted=true + records deletedBy. Hidden from students immediately. Files remain on Cloudinary.

Auth: TEACHER role + must own the material.

Teacher: list YouTube videos for a batch.

**New in v1.0.10**

body.raw:
{
    "url": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ",
    "title": "Quadratic Equations - Full Lecture",
    "batchId": 1,
    "description": "Complete walkthrough of quadratic equations",
    "category": "Mathematics",
    "publish": true,
    "notifyStudents": false
}

request.description:
Teacher: add a YouTube video for a batch.

Required: url (YouTube link), title, batchId
Optional: description, category, publish (true=PUBLIC, false=PRIVATE), notifyStudents

**New in v1.0.10**

Teacher: update a YouTube video. All fields optional.

**New in v1.0.10**

Teacher: soft-delete a YouTube video. Hidden from students immediately.

**New in v1.0.10**

YouTube videos for the student's batch.

Cache: 10 min (per batch)

Notes/PDFs for the student's batch.

Cache: 10 min (per batch)

Study materials with typed file arrays for the student's batch.

Cache: 10 min (per batch)

item.name: Fees
item.description: Student fee receipts and summary + Teacher fee management

request.description: All fee receipts for the authenticated student.
Fees summary: total due, total paid, balance, payment history.

Active fee structures for the student's batch: name, amount, frequency, dueDay, lateFee, gracePeriod, description.

Cache: 60 min

item.name: Teacher: Get Students with Fee Status

request.description:
Teacher: list all students in their batches with fee status.

Returns: [{ id, fullname, rollNumber, batch, paidAmount, pendingAmount, dueDate, status }]

Query params: ?batchId= (filter by batch), ?status= (PENDING|PARTIAL|OVERDUE|PAID)

Auth: TEACHER role

**Updated in v1.0.11**: added rollNumber, paidAmount, batchId/status filters

Teacher: get full fee history and summary for a specific student.

Returns: { student, receipts[], summary }

Auth: TEACHER role + must teach in student's batch

**New in v1.0.10**

body.raw:
{
    "paidAmount": 500,
    "paymentMode": "CASH",
    "transactionId": null,
    "chequeNumber": null,
    "notes": "Partial payment collected in class"
}

request.description:
Teacher: record a payment against a fee receipt.

Required: paidAmount (number > 0), paymentMode (CASH|UPI|BANK_TRANSFER|CHEQUE|ONLINE)
Optional: transactionId, chequeNumber, notes

Status auto-computed: PAID if remaining=0, PARTIAL if partially paid

Auth: TEACHER role + must teach in student's batch

**New in v1.0.10**

Teacher: send a push notification fee reminder to a student.

Fires a push notification to all the student's registered devices.

Auth: TEACHER role

**New in v1.0.10**

item.name: Doubts
item.description: Student asks doubts, teacher replies. Bottom nav tab Doubts.

request.description: Student: list all my doubts. ?page=&limit=
Student: post a new doubt. Body: {title, description, subject?}
Student: view doubt with all replies. Replace 1 with actual doubtId.
Teacher: list doubts from their batch students. ?batchId=&status=OPEN|ANSWERED|RESOLVED&page=&limit=
Teacher: reply to a student doubt. Replace 1 with doubtId.
Teacher or Student: mark a doubt as resolved. Replace 1 with doubtId.

item.name: Teacher: Announcements
item.description: Teacher creates and manages their own announcements.

request.description: Teacher: create an announcement visible to all students. Multipart form.

formdata.value: Full content of the announcement goes here.

request.description: Teacher: update their own announcement. Replace 1 with announcementId.
Teacher: soft-delete (deactivate) their own announcement. Replace 1 with announcementId.
Teacher: toggle pinned status on their announcement. Replace 1 with announcementId.

item.name: Teacher: Profile
item.description: Teacher profile with extended info: Academic Background, Workload, Subjects, and Grade Chips (computed from distinct batch names the teacher teaches).

request.description: Teacher: get own profile including qualification, experience, subjects, computed workload (batches, weekly hours), and grades[] — distinct batch names the teacher currently teaches (e.g. ["Grade 9-A", "Grade 10-B"]). Frontend uses these to render the GRADE X chip badges.
Teacher: update own extended profile. All fields optional.

body.raw:
{
    "phone": "+91 9876543210",
    "gender": "Female",
    "qualification": "Ph.D. in Mathematics",
    "university": "University of Mumbai, 2015",
    "experience": 10,
    "workTimingFrom": "08:00",
    "workTimingTo": "16:00",
    "primarySubjects": [
        "Algebra",
        "Calculus"
    ],
    "secondarySubjects": [
        "Statistics"
    ],
    "bio": "Passionate mathematics teacher with 10 years experience."
}
